emails.subject: Auto Scheduler
emails.body: Will, Can you tell me what day was the last to be rolled in Auto Scheduler? I'm trying to go back into December to balance Enpower for Settlement purposes. Thank you, Diana Scholtes 503-464-3807

emails.subject: RE: Auto Scheduler
emails.body: RE: Auto Scheduler For the West: Schedule: 12/14/2001 12/28/2001 Analysis: 4/2/1996 12/13/2001 Regards, Will To: Smith, Will

emails.subject: RE: Auto Scheduler
emails.body: Hey Will! Remeber us dicussing deals showing up in Real-Time Position manager that are the EPMI-West-Bank. Can you remove these from this view? thanks, Diana To: Scholtes, Diana

emails.subject: RE: Auto Scheduler
emails.body: Diana, I need to leave for today. I will look into this first thing tomorrow morning. If it is more urgent give me a call at 713-417-4679 or contact Duong Luu or Bill Crooks. Regards, Will To: Smith, Will
